creator: jason@aventia.pw
text:
Hi everyone,

Normally I just email the maintainer, but some ports use a mailing list as is the case here.  So I am happy to update the bug report.

It seems this bug remains open as I have now the same error on a different server.  I am not sure why folks refer to poudriere as Portmaster is not depreciated.
Kind Regards,
Jason
